base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of brick_wall_vertical_scroll — a tile from 1986 castlevania. Tall brick-wall strip — used as inter-level vertical scroll background during stage transitions (ascending Simon climbs through castle layers). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Tall brick-wall strip — used as inter-level vertical scroll background during stage transitions (ascending Simon climbs through castle layers)
